sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_crc64 (id UInt32, data String, checksum UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_crc64 (id, data, checksum) VALUES (1, 'test_string', CRC64('test_string'));
UPDATE test_crc64 SET checksum = CRC64(data) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, data, CRC64(data) AS computed_checksum FROM test_crc64;
SELECT id FROM test_crc64 WHERE checksum = CRC64(data) ORDER BY id DESC;
